zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Douglas於1297年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯時，他的父親Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas54歲，母親Eleanor Lovaine30歲。他於1320年與Lady Beatrice de Lindsay在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛迪安別利其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年7月19日在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾享年36歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯 卡素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archibald Douglas于1297年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯时，他的父亲Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas54岁，母亲Eleanor Lovaine30岁。他于1320年与Lady Beatrice de Lindsay在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛迪安別利其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年7月19日在苏格兰貝維其可爾享年36岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Douglas was born in 1297, in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas, was 54 and his mother, Eleanor Lovaine, was 30. He married Lady Beatrice de Lindsay in 1320, in Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 19 July 1333, in Berwickshire, Scotland, at the age of 36, and was buried in Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Douglas est né en 1297, à Douglas, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Lovaine, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Beatrice de Lindsay en 1320, à Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 juillet 1333, à Berwickshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Douglas 1297 in Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas 54 und seine Mutter Eleanor Lovaine 30. Er hat 1320 in Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland Lady Beatrice de Lindsay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Juli 1333 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Berwickshire, Scotland und wurde in Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas è nato il nel 1297 nel Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Lovaine, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lady Beatrice de Lindsay nel 1320, nel Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 luglio 1333, nel Berwickshire, Scotland, all'età di 36 anni, e fu sepolto a Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglasが1297年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラスで生まれた時，父Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglasは54歳，母Eleanor Lovaineは30歳であった。1320年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスアンブリッジでLady Beatrice de Lindsayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1333年7月19日にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアで36歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラス カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglas(이)가 1297년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Lovaine(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1320년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로스이누브리지에서 Lady Beatrice de Lindsay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 7월 19일 스컷랜드 버윅실르에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스 카스틀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas nasceu em 1297, em Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Lovaine, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Beatrice de Lindsay em 1320, em Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de julho de 1333, em Berwickshire, Scotland, com 36 anos, e foi sepultado em Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Douglas родился в 1297 г. в местности доуглас, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Lovaine, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Beatrice de Lindsay в 1320 г. в местности лотянбридж, мидлотян, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 июля 1333 г. в местности бирвиккшир, Шотландия в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности доуглас кастл, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archibald Douglas nació en 1297, en Douglas, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Lord William "Le Hardi" Douglas 5th Laird of Douglas, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Eleanor Lovaine, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lady Beatrice de Lindsay en 1320, en Lothianbridge, Midlothian, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de julio de 1333, en Berwickshire, Scotland, a la edad de 36 años, y fue sepultado en Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
